person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Ela Longespee was born about 1222 at Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

She was the daughter of William Lungespei.

Ella was married to James de Aldithele or Audithele James de Audley, Knt, was of Heleigh in Audley, Staffordshire, England.

On 16 July, 56 Henry III [1272], a writ of certiorari was issued on the complaint of Ella, late the wife of James de Aldithele alias de Audithele, that the escheator had taken into the king's hand the manors of Stratton and Wechewik, which were of her free marriage of the gift of her father William Lungespei. The resultant inquisition into James' estate found his son, James, aged 22 and more, was his heir, and the manors of Stretton and Wrechewic, Oxfordshire, were held of the fee of Henry de Laci, and were given in free marriage with the said Ella to the said James.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela de Longespée於大約1224年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William 'the Younger' Longespée18歲，母親Idoine Camville21歲。她於1254年11月與Philip Basset Justiciar of England在英國巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆希 維可姆 其特利結婚。她去世於大約1299年11月22日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela de Longespée于大约1224年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William 'the Younger' Longespée18岁，母亲Idoine Camville21岁。她于1254年11月与Philip Basset Justiciar of England在英国巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆希 維可姆 其特利结婚。她去世于大约1299年11月22日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: of uncertain derivation. It is thought in part to be a combination of elements from   Elizabeth   and   Mary ;  in part a feminine equivalent of   Elmer .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela de Longespée was born about 1224, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William 'the Younger' Longespée, was 18 and her mother, Idoine Camville, was 21. She married Philip Basset Justiciar of England in November 1254, in High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. She died about 22 November 1299, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela de Longespée est née environ 1224, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William 'the Younger' Longespée, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Idoine Camville, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Philip Basset Justiciar of England en novembre 1254, à High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée environ 22 novembre 1299, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat im November 1254 in High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England Philip Basset Justiciar of England geheiratet. Sie starb um 22. November 1299 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Philip Basset Justiciar of England nel novembre 1254, nel High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. Morì circa 22 novembre 1299, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela de Longespéeが約1224年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William 'the Younger' Longespéeは18歳，母Idoine Camvilleは21歳であった。1254年11月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヒグ ウイコンベヒグ ウイコンベ セメテリーでPhilip Basset Justiciar of Englandと結婚した。彼女は約1299年11月22日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buc: 영국 벅잉함실르 히 윈이코브 히 윈이코브 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Ela de Longespée(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William 'the Younger' Longespée(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idoine Camville(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1254년 11월 영국 벅잉함실르 히 윈이코브 히 윈이코브 세멧리에서 Philip Basset Justiciar of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1299년 11월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela de Longespée nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William 'the Younger' Longespée, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Idoine Camville, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip Basset Justiciar of England em novembro de 1254, em High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 22 de novembro de 1299, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buc: хаи викомб кеметири, хаи викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela de Longespée родилась около 1224 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William 'the Younger' Longespée было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Idoine Camville, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Basset Justiciar of England ноябрь 1254 г. в местности хаи викомб кеметири, хаи викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия. Она умерла около 22 ноября 1299 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
